name_en: 🎁Model: M46643 Monogram Vintage Saddle. 🥇Original Leather. This Micro Chantilly handbag is made of Monogram canvas, with a unique shape and small size that adds an elegant touch to any outfit. Inspired by the original Chantilly bag first introduced in 1978, it is exquisitely crafted and highly practical, with meticulous design that makes the bag even more refined. The bag comes with a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, which can be worn on the shoulder or diagonally.

12.5 x 13 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)
